sub_goals.description: manifest.json + index.js entry + README.md. Manifest uses reverse-DNS UUID, SDKVersion:1, Windows OS entry, Software.MinimumVersion:'3.10.188.226', Nodejs.Version:'20', one Action targeting the N4 Pro Touch Bar with Controllers including the documented analogue, no PropertyInspector. README is verbatim install steps with the AppData path.

verification_rationale: S4.A1 (.sdPlugin dir): produced by integrator from these source files. S4.A2 (manifest schema): Author/Name/Version/CodePath/Description/Icon all populated; SDKVersion=1; OS array with Platform:'windows'; one Action. S4.A3 (README install path): 'HotSpot\StreamDock\plugins' present verbatim. S4.A4 (zip): produced by integrator. IP4.A1, IP4.A2, IP1.A1, IP1.A2, IP1.A3, IP1.A4 all satisfied by manifest contents. DCA.A2 (Windows OS entry), DCA.A10 (Software.MinimumVersion), DCA.OOS.cross-model (N4 Pro target), DCA.OOS.non-windows (no mac OS branches) all hold.
